Tests the `valueOf` method for a `Boolean` object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that verifies the behavior of the `Boolean` object in JavaScript. It checks that calling the `valueOf` method on a `Boolean` object created with the value `false` returns `false`. This test ensures that the `Boolean` object correctly represents its internal value when the `valueOf` method is used. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on the correctness of the `Boolean` object's `valueOf` method.
